Standards Resources

Publicly accessible references for ISO 42001 context and related global best practice.

Open Align42

ISO 42001 and ISO AI Governance Context

  • ISO news: publication context for ISO/IEC 42001
  • ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 42 (Artificial Intelligence) committee page

Authoritative AI Risk and Governance Frameworks

  • NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
  • NIST Generative AI Profile
  • OECD AI Principles
  • UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of AI

Regulatory and Regional Sources

  • EU AI Act (official text on EUR-Lex)
  • UK ICO guidance on AI and data protection
  • Singapore Model AI Governance Framework (IMDA)
  • U.S. Blueprint for an AI Bill of Rights (OSTP)
  • Australian Government consultations on safe and responsible AI
  • Australian Government policy: Artificial Intelligence (Digital Transformation Agency)
  • OAIC guidance on AI and privacy
  • eSafety Commissioner: AI safety and regulatory perspective

All links above are public and do not intentionally rely on paywalled standards text or login-gated access.
